locations.name: Entrance Hall
locations.description: Dusty brass doors lead deeper into the observatory.

locations.name: Main Hall
locations.description: A large hall with a high ceiling and a grand staircase. A narrow door beneath the landing bears a tarnished caretaker's plaque.

exits.label: Climb the staircase to the observatory

requirement.failureMessage: The staircase is locked. You need a key to proceed.

locations.name: Caretaker's Study
locations.description: Dusty ledgers cover a cramped desk. Beneath the staircase mechanism, something brass glints among a ring of old keys.

items.takeLabel: Take the caretaker's journal from the desk

locations.name: Observatory
locations.description: A circular room with a domed ceiling and a telescope pointing towards the stars. Star charts and celestial maps adorn the walls, and a faint hum of machinery can be heard.

exits.label: Descend back to the main hall
Open the sealed door to the star chamber

requirement.failureMessage: The star chamber remains sealed. Its mechanism appears to be connected to the telescope.

items.takeLabel: Lift the telescope lens from its protective case

interactions.label: Repair the telescope
interactions.completionMessage: You carefully fit the lens into the telescope. As its mechanism returns to life, gears turn within the wall and release the seal on the star chamber.

requirement.failureMessage: You need the telescope lens to repair the telescope.

locations.name: Star Chamber
locations.description: A hidden chamber lies beneath a domed ceiling of dark glass. Silver lines trace unfamiliar constellations across the floor, converging on an empty pedestal at the room's center.
